Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Public items documented; user-facing output preserves the
      "evidence, not absolution" framing
- [ ] All commits signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO) — and signed if possible
- [ ] Registry changes cite provenance (`_sources`, `_note`) and add/adjust tests
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing)
